title: The homesteading hippie vagabond
summary: He lives inside me. This misfit; the homesteading hippie vagabond. He’s set-up shop in there, and seems quite comfortable. Being a builder, his presence can be quite a challenge. I try to sway him toward revenue-focused building efforts & “rocket-ship” growth opportunities, but he shrugs. His hippie nature prefers alternatives. Somehow, over the years, he .…
content:
He lives inside me. This misfit; the homesteading hippie vagabond. He’s set-up shop in there, and seems quite comfortable. Being a builder, his presence can be quite a challenge.
